docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,465.00 FILED BY CONSOLIDATED DEBRIS BOX SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHARTER CONSTRUCTION CO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-18-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHARTER CONSTRUCTION CO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CONSOLIDATED DEBRIS BOX SERVICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHARTER CONSTRUCTION CO $1,465.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,515.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CHARTER CONSTRUCTION CO HEARING SET FOR SEP-29-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
CONT' REQUESTED BY PLNTF.(CONSOLIDATED)RESERVED FO R OCT. 18,94 AT 8:00AM. FOR MOVAC. SENT TO JUDGE.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT CONTINUED FROM SEP-29-1994 TO OCT-18-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF OCT-18-1994, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CONSOLIDATED DEBRIS BOX SERVICE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHARTER CONSTRUCTION CO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
